since_last: 35% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.71%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC +1.70% · Gold -0.31% · Nasdaq100 -0.49%. 35% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.71%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.71%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -3.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +16.62%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +16.62%, VRT +6.14%, MU +5.22%, INTC +5.04%, PWR +5.04%. Laggards: SPCX -13.29%, AVAV -10.96%, ARM -7.51%, PLTR -6.98%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -13.29% at $160.42
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -13.29% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
